title: Trimble Introduces Mixed Reality for Construction Layout with FieldLink MR
text: SUNNYVALE, Calif., Jan. 31, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) announced today an innovative mixed-reality solution for construction layout with the introduction of the FieldLink MR app.

title: Trimble Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2021 Earnings Call and Web Cast
text: SUNNYVALE, Calif. , Jan. 27, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) will hold a conference call on Wednesday, February 9, 2022 at 5 a.m.

title: Trimble (TRMB) Boosts Buildings Segment Via Steering Control
text: Trimble (TRMB) adds the Horizontal Steering Control capability to the Trimble Earthworks Grade Control Platform for Soil Compactors.

title: Trimble Introduces Industry's First Horizontal Steering Control for Soil Compactors
text: SUNNYVALE, Calif. , Jan. 18, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) announced today Horizontal Steering Control functionality on the Trimble® Earthworks Grade Control Platform for Soil Compactors, the industry's first automatic steering control solution for soil compactors—and the next step towards Trimble's autonomous vision.

title: Thomas Sweet Joins Trimble's Board of Directors
text: SUNNYVALE, Calif., Jan. 13, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) announced today the appointment of Thomas Sweet to its Board of Directors, effective January 15, 2022.
